title: senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. vernalis
intro: Senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. vernalis, also known as Autumn cress or White-rayed Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Senecio leucanthemifolius subsp. vernalis include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support liver and kidney function.
